offer: For insurance brokers processing 5–15 submissions/month, inefficient data handling causes delays in underwriting approvals. We automate the conversion of policy data instead of manual data entry and submission processes.
problem: Inefficient conversion of insurance policy data into underwriting submissions.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to insurance brokers with demo video
Join community forums for insurance broker tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry interface and data validation checks on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
